ksa_text: Knowledge of database management system (DBMS) principles and practices, including data persistence, transaction management, index optimization, query performance tuning, backup and recovery procedures, and data retention policies.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.

top_anchors.element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology
Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Quality KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.421) to justify inclusion for the Chief Data Scientist. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.421 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Data Quality. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Data Quality is not sufficiently central to the Chief Data Scientist to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Chief Data Scientist roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Quality is not a standard competency expectation for Chief Data Scientist. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Chief Data Scientist competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.421) and edge-domain placement (Data Quality) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Chief Data Scientist. All passes support exclusion.
